languages.text: "У каждого из них свои окончательные цели. Ксенобиологис Оксильда Таванти больше всего заинтересована в тайнах геноконструирования. Магос Тау-Фи-0098 в первую очередь известен использованием своих исследований для безопасности Человечества. Каис-торр-Шайга призывает подумать о выгодах, которые можно извлечь из Заркова".

"They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."
languages.original_text: "У каждого из них свои окончательные цели. Ксенобиологис Оксильда Таванти больше всего заинтересована в тайнах геноконструирования. Магос Тау-Фи-0098 в первую очередь известен использованием своих исследований для безопасности Человечества. Каис-торр-Шайга призывает подумать о выгодах, которые можно извлечь из Заркова".

traits.locale_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

"They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

"They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

languages.text: 「それぞれが独自の目標を持っている。遺伝子工学の謎に興味を持つゼノ生物学者オキシルダ・タヴァンティ。人類の安全を研究の目的とするマゴス・タウ・フィ・0098。そしてカイストル・シャイガは、ザルコフから得られる恩恵について考えるよう促している」
languages.original_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 「それぞれが独自の目標を持っている。遺伝子工学の謎に興味を持つゼノ生物学者オキシルダ・タヴァンティ。人類の安全を研究の目的とするマゴス・タウ・フィ・0098。そしてカイストル・シャイガは、ザルコフから得られる恩恵について考えるよう促している。」

languages.text: «Cada uno tiene sus propios objetivos. La xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti está interesada principalmente en los misterios de la ingeniería genética. El magos Tau-Fi-0098 tiene fama de utilizar su investigación para reforzar la seguridad de la Humanidad. Kais-torr-Shaiga nos insta a pensar en todos los beneficios que podemos obtener de Zarkov».
languages.original_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: «Cada uno tiene sus propios objetivos. La xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti está interesada principalmente en los misterios de la ingeniería genética. El magos Tau-Fi-0098 tiene fama de utilizar su investigación para reforzar la seguridad de la Humanidad. Kais-torr-Shaiga nos insta a pensar en todos los beneficios que podemos obtener de Zarkov».

languages.text: “三人目的各不相同：异形生物贤者，奥克西尔达·塔凡蒂的主要兴趣在基因工程的奥秘；贤者陶-斐-0098以保障人类安全的研究而闻名；至于凯斯-托尔-夏迦，则敦促我们关注扎尔科夫的利润潜力。”
languages.original_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: “三人目的各不相同：异形生物贤者，奥克西尔达·塔凡蒂的主要兴趣在基因工程的奥秘；贤者陶-斐-0098以保障人类安全的研究而闻名；至于凯斯-托尔-夏迦，则敦促我们关注扎尔科夫的利润潜力。”

languages.text: "Allerdings verfolgen sie unterschiedliche Ziele. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti interessiert sich vor allem für die Geheimnisse der Genmanipulation. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist in erster Linie für seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Sicherheit der Menschheit bekannt. Kais-torr-Shaiga drängt uns, die Vorteile zu bedenken, die uns Zarkov gewähren könnte."
languages.original_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Allerdings verfolgen sie unterschiedliche Ziele. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti interessiert sich vor allem für die Geheimnisse der Genmanipulation. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist in erster Linie für seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Sicherheit der Menschheit bekannt. Kais-torr-Shaiga drängt uns, die Vorteile zu bedenken, die uns Zarkov gewähren könnte."

languages.text: "Her birinin kendi nihai hedefleri var. Zenobiyologis Oksilda Tavanti, esasen genetik mühendisliğinin gizemleriyle ilgileniyor. Magos Tau-Fi-0098, öncelikle araştırmalarını İnsanlığın güvenliği için kullanmasıyla bilinir. Kais-torr-Shaiga ise bizi Zarkov'dan elde edilebilecek faydaları düşünmeye teşvik ediyor."
languages.original_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Her birinin kendi nihai hedefleri var. Zenobiyologis Oksilda Tavanti, esasen genetik mühendisliğinin gizemleriyle ilgileniyor. Magos Tau-Fi-0098, öncelikle araştırmalarını İnsanlığın güvenliği için kullanmasıyla bilinir. Kais-torr-Shaiga ise bizi Zarkov'dan elde edilebilecek faydaları düşünmeye teşvik ediyor."

languages.text: « Chacun d'entre eux poursuit ses propres objectifs. La xénobiologiste Oksilda Tavanti s'intéresse principalement aux mystères de l'ingénierie génétique. Le magos Tau-Phi-0098 est surtout connu pour mettre ses recherches au service de la sécurité de l'humanité. Kais-torr-Shaiga nous invite à réfléchir aux avantages que nous pourrions tirer de Zarkov. »
languages.original_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

Le magos Tau-Phi-0098 est surtout connu pour mettre ses recherches au service de la sécurité de l'humanité.
